data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of unified reporting for admissions under the same offer identity. However, the evidence does not confirm that all admissions roll up under the same offer/sellable identity, as required. The linked use case mentions the need for unified reporting, but there is no direct evidence or prior step that verifies this functionality, leading to a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: Unified reporting for all admissions under the same offer/sellable identity is not confirmed.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
